purpose: Curated weekly sources for discovering new wallets and cross-checking existing wallet changes.

resources.name: No Bullshit Bitcoin - releases tag
resources.why: High-signal release posts for Bitcoin wallets, nodes, and infrastructure.

resources.name: No Bullshit Bitcoin - posts sitemap
resources.why: Machine-readable archive; scan for existing wallet IDs/names plus new wallet phrases.

resources.name: Bitcoin Optech newsletters
resources.why: Protocol-level wallet changes, vulnerability context, fee/PSBT/miniscript/Taproot updates.

resources.name: WalletScrutiny
resources.why: Checks reproducibility/open-source claims and highlights custody/security caveats.

resources.name: Bitcoin Design Guide - daily spending wallet
resources.why: Good qualitative reference for wallet UX and newcomer-fit criteria.

resources.name: Bitcoin.org choose wallet
resources.why: Mainstream wallet directory; useful for candidates but not authoritative.

resources.name: Jameson Lopp recommended wallets
resources.why: Long-running curated Bitcoin resource list with wallet sections.

resources.name: F-Droid package search - bitcoin wallet
resources.why: Find Android wallets with published source/reproducible-build signals.

resources.name: Apple iTunes Search API - bitcoin wallet
resources.why: Detect iOS wallet candidates and app metadata changes.

resources.name: Google Play search - bitcoin wallet
resources.why: Detect Android wallet candidates; scrape cautiously because Play can be noisy.

resources.name: GitHub topic - bitcoin-wallet
resources.why: Find open-source wallet repos sorted by activity/popularity.

resources.name: GitHub topic - lightning-wallet
resources.why: Find Lightning wallet candidates and active repos.

resources.name: GitHub topic - cashu
resources.why: Find ecash/Cashu wallet candidates.

resources.name: GitHub API search - bitcoin wallet
resources.why: Machine-readable active repo discovery; rate-limited without auth.

resources.name: GitHub API search - lightning wallet
resources.why: Machine-readable Lightning wallet discovery; rate-limited without auth.

resources.name: GitHub API search - cashu wallet
resources.why: Machine-readable Cashu/ecash wallet discovery.

resources.name: Nostr Wallet Connect / NIP-47 repos search
resources.why: Find wallets integrating Nostr wallet/payment flows.

resources.name: Bitcoin Magazine wallets tag
resources.why: Broader industry news; noisier than NoBS, useful for launch announcements.

resources.name: Stacker News wallet search
resources.why: Community chatter can surface new wallet launches and regressions early.

resources.name: OpenSats blog
resources.why: Funding announcements often identify new or important open-source wallet projects.

resources.name: Spiral blog
resources.why: Spiral-backed wallet/tooling projects and ecosystem updates.
